title: Global Betting Report
headline: Across the betting landscape, attention turns to the board, where moneylines, spreads, and totals help frame the day's market outlook.
snapshot: Odds, implied probability, line movement, market context, and what bettors should monitor across the sports world.

sections.title: Market Watch
sections.headline: Across the betting landscape, attention turns to the board, where moneylines, spreads, and totals help frame the day's market outlook.
sections.snapshot: Moneylines, spreads, totals, board depth, and sportsbook pricing are being monitored for betting-market movement.
key_data: Market board is active across available leagues.
what_the_odds_mean: Line movement matters most when it connects to injuries, weather, roster news, or sportsbook adjustment.
what_to_watch: Track favorites getting more expensive or underdogs drawing late money.
Compare sportsbook movement before treating one number as the full market.

sections.title: Betting Context
sections.headline: What bettors should monitor today
sections.snapshot: Track line movement, injury news, starting lineup changes, pitching confirmations, weather, rest advantages, and late market steam before making any betting decision.
key_data: Betting context requires line movement plus supporting news.
what_the_odds_mean: A number alone is not a recommendation. Context explains why the market may be moving.
what_to_watch: Injuries, pitching confirmations, weather, public money, and late sportsbook adjustment.
